title: Module 1
content:
Manufacturing output, Operations Systems, Operations Strategy,  Functional
strategy within context of a firm, Functional dominance within corporate
strategy, Concept of world class manufacturing organization, 6 Ps of
Manufacturing, Skinners’ view and Hayes and Wheelwright framework of
Manufacturing Strategy, Alternative paradigm of manufacturing strategy,
Some generic manufacturing strategies

title: Module 2
content:
Developing a manufacturing strategy, Understanding markets, The concept
of order winners and qualifiers, Basic Characteristics and Specific
Dimensions of Order Winners and Qualifiers
Developing an Operations Strategy: Methodology, Developing an
Operations Strategy

title: Module 3
content:
Developing an Operations Strategy: Roth and Miller Classification,
Enlightened View of Manufacturing, Manufacturing Strategy Taxonomy,
Total Quality Management and Manufacturing Excellence, Deming’s
approach to Quality, Business Excellence Awards, Process Choice, Process
Choice: 3 Dimensional View,  Product Profiling

title: Module 4
content:
Critical success factors for World Class Manufacturing, Value Added
Engineering, Total Employee Involvement, HR theories for Operations
Strategy, Flexible Manufacturing system, Toyota production System, World
Class Manufacturing and India
